note_text: Wound note - Rightbuttock. Meas 3.8x4.1x0.9cm. Mod serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 64% gran, 36% slough. Periwound erythematous. Foam dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Nguyen notified.
